goal:
Update TypeScript source files in a Roblox-TS game project to use a new networking module. This is a Roblox game, NOT a Discord bot. Do not generate any Discord or bot related code.

The project is at /mnt/c/Users/Matthew/Downloads/Anime-Reborn-LobbyUI

A new shared networking module already exists at:
- places/common/src/shared/network.ts (exports GlobalEvents)
- places/common/src/shared/network-types.ts (exports types)

GlobalEvents API:
- Server side: GlobalEvents.server.eventName.connect((player, ...args) => {}) to receive from client
- Server side: GlobalEvents.client.eventName.fire(player, ...args) to send to client
- Client side: GlobalEvents.client.eventName.connect((...args) => {}) to receive from server
- Client side: GlobalEvents.server.eventName.fire(...args) to send to server

Available server events (client fires these): atomInit, atomUpdate, unitAction, purchaseShopItem, claimDailyReward, createMatch, joinMatch, leaveMatch, listJoinableMatches
Available client events (server fires these): atomSync, createMatchResult, matchJoined, matchLeft, joinableMatches, matchStarted, matchCancelled, notifyPlayer

TASK: Read each file listed below, replace the old @network import with `import { GlobalEvents } from "@common-shared/network"`, and update all network call sites to use the new GlobalEvents API. Preserve all other logic exactly.

Files to update:

1. places/common/src/server/services/data_store/inputs/units/equip.ts
   - OLD: import Network from "@network/server"; and Extract<Network.Common.PlayerData.Atom.UnitsUnion, ...>
   - NEW: import type { UnitsUnion } from "@common-shared/network-types"; and Extract<UnitsUnion, ...>

2. places/common/src/server/services/data_store/inputs/units/favorite.ts
   - Same as equip.ts

3. places/common/src/server/services/data_store/inputs/units/lock.ts
   - Same as equip.ts

4. places/common/src/server/services/data_store/inputs/quests/kills.ts
   - OLD: import Network and Extract<Network.Common.PlayerData.Atom.QuestsUnion, ...>
   - NEW: import type { QuestsUnion } from "@common-shared/network-types" and Extract<QuestsUnion, ...>

5. places/common/src/server/services/data_store/index.ts
   - OLD: import Network from "@network/server"
   - Replace: Network.Common.PlayerData.Atom.init.on => GlobalEvents.server.atomInit.connect
   - Replace: Network.Common.PlayerData.Atom.update.on => GlobalEvents.server.atomUpdate.connect
   - Replace: Network.Common.PlayerData.Atom.sync.fire(player, payload) => GlobalEvents.client.atomSync.fire(player, payload)
   - Replace type cast Map<string, Network.Common.PlayerData.DataStore.Player.Default> with Record<string, unknown>

Output each updated file with full content to its exact path.
